tluaLabelUnused.tlua(3,7): error TS7028: Unused label.


==== tluaLabelUnused.tlua (1 errors) ====
    // A label no goto targets is reported.
    function unused(): void
        ::dead::
          ~~~~
!!! error TS7028: Unused label.
    end
    
    // A label a goto targets is silent.
    function used(): void
        ::live::
        goto live
    end
